song.title: Stir Up a Hunger
song.author: Paul and Rita Baloche
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G Gsus Day into night, . Em D You can turn the dark into light . C D You can take a soul that was lost . G Gsus And turn it around.
[V2] .G Gsus Lord on my own . Em D My heart can turn as hard as a stone . C D But You can make it tender again . G With Your love.
[C] .G Stir up a hunger, .D/F# Em D Stir up a hunger in my heart . C G D Nothing will satisfy me, nothing else will do . G D/F# Stir up a hunger . Dm/F C A hunger in my heart . F D G D Stir up a hunger in my heart for more of You
